zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强，上行趋势延续
zh.content:
当前价格运行于60034.98附近，高于20日均线58870.19，显示中期趋势仍偏多。近二十四小时小幅上涨，价格持续保持在日内区间上沿附近，短线多头仍占据一定优势，但追高需关注回撤风险。

从技术指标观察，MACD数值为89.01，维持正值，说明多头动能依然存在，不过由于信号线及RSI数据暂缺，趋势确认力度略有不足。若后续成交量同步放大，则有望推动行情进一步向上拓展空间。

支撑方面，可重点关注59440附近的日内低点，以及58870附近的20日均线区域；若跌破上述位置，短线可能转入整理。阻力则关注60470一线，高位突破后，有机会进一步测试更高价格区间。

交易策略上，建议保持顺势思路，以回调分批布局为主，避免在压力位盲目追涨。已经持有多单者可采用移动止盈方式锁定利润，若价格有效突破阻力并伴随放量，可考虑适度加仓，同时严格设置止损控制风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin continues to trade with a mild upward bias, holding near 60,035 after a modest 0.96% daily gain. Price action remains compressed within a short-term consolidation band between 59,440 and 60,474, reflecting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Stability above the 60,000 psychological area signals resilience, while the market structure remains cautiously constructive as price holds above the 20-day SMA at 58,870, supporting the idea of gradually forming higher lows.

Momentum indicators are leaning positive, with MACD at 89.0068 suggesting ongoing bullish pressure despite the absence of a visible signal line for full confirmation. The lack of RSI data leaves overbought or oversold conditions undefined, limiting precision in momentum assessment. Still, price behavior above the mid-range indicates accumulation tendencies rather than distribution, implying buyers retain control unless momentum visibly weakens or MACD begins to roll over.

Key resistance is positioned at 60,474, marking the recent swing high and immediate breakout barrier. A sustained move above this level could open room toward 61,500–62,000, where prior supply may reappear. On the downside, initial support sits at 59,440, followed by stronger confluence around the 20-day SMA at 58,870. A breakdown below this zone would weaken structure and expose the 58,000 region as the next psychological defense area.

Short-term conditions favor a range-based approach, with potential long interest emerging near 59,440 down toward the SMA zone, while upside profit-taking may cluster between 60,400 and 61,500. Breakout participation becomes more relevant only on a confirmed close above 60,474 with expanding volume. Risk control remains important, with protective stops ideally placed below 58,800 to guard against a broader momentum shift. Overall stance remains cautiously bullish.
